title: No-Flap Letterplate Seal – White PVC Door Draft Stopper, Prevents Dust & Cold Air
features: EFFECTIVE DRAFT SEAL: Stops cold air, dust, and debris entering through your letterbox gap for improved home insulation and comfort.
SIMPLE DESIGN – NO FLAP: Clean, modern look without the need for a letterplate flap; ideal for those who prefer a minimal, streamlined door finish.
EASY TO INSTALL: Quick and straightforward fitting process using standard tools, suitable for most standard letterboxes.
DURABLE PVC CONSTRUCTION: Made from high-quality white PVC for long-lasting performance and resistance to wear and weather.
ENERGY SAVING SOLUTION: Helps reduce heat loss and improve energy efficiency by sealing gaps effectively around the letterplate.
description: Product Description The Exitex Letterplate Seal PVC (No Flap) White is a simple, effective way to stop drafts, dust, and debris entering through your letterbox gap. Designed for a clean, modern look without a flap, it improves insulation while keeping your door neat and tidy. Key Benefits Effective draft seal: Helps block cold air, dust, and debris for a more comfortable home. No flap design: Minimal, streamlined finish that suits contemporary doors. Energy saving: Reduces heat loss and supports better home energy efficiency. Durable PVC: High-quality white PVC that is long lasting and easy to clean. Quick installation: Fits most standard letterboxes with basic tools. Details Made from robust white PVC, this seal performs in all seasons and maintains its appearance over time. It is ideal for upgrades or simple improvements to front door insulation. Once fitted, it provides a reliable barrier and a professional finish. Ideal For Reducing drafts around the letterbox opening Improving energy efficiency in homes and rentals Achieving a clean, flap-free door appearance
